message:
fix(gitlab): address PR review findings for merge readiness

- Add wrapper functions (doPullFromGitLab, doPushToGitLab,
  detectGitLabConflicts) so integration tests compile
- Change IssueConversion.Issue from interface{} to *types.Issue
  (new package, no backwards compat needed); remove GetIssue() helper
- Replace raw http.Client in runGitLabProjects with gitlab.Client
  method (ListProjects), getting retry/auth logic for free
- Add HTTPS validation on GitLab URL to prevent sending tokens
  in cleartext (allows localhost for dev/testing)
- Add io.LimitReader (50MB) to client.go doRequest to prevent OOM
- Improve token masking: show only first 4 chars, not first+last 4

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Executed-By: beads/crew/emma
Rig: beads
Role: crew
